title: Crystal Chariot: a poem for the moment
summary: Held apart across a crystal divide A chariot holding me made of glass I should be so lucky as to ride inside this thing I can see but I cannot touch I can travel and I cannot go home How long until it shatters? What will happen as I fall?
content:
Held apart
across a crystal divide
A chariot holding me
made of glass

I should be so lucky
as to ride inside this thing

I can see
but I cannot touch
I can travel
and I cannot go home

How long until it shatters?
What will happen as I fall?
